title: SEC Relocates Port Harcourt Office
description: In a view to serve investors in the Southern part of the country effectively, and also make the regulator more accessible to the investing public, the Securities and Exchange Commission has relocated
html:
In a view to serve investors in the Southern part of the country effectively, and also make the regulator more accessible to the investing public, the Securities and Exchange Commission has relocated its zonal office in Port Harcourt to a more central location.

According to a statement from the Commission, the new address is 5B Isaiah Idolu Street, GRA Phase 2, Port Harcourt.

The Commission therefore enjoins market participants and stakeholders especially those in the South South region of the country to note the relocation.
